code: export class InventoryMessageParser{constructor(){this._items=[];}flush(){this._items=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper){console.warn('❌ Inventory parser received no wrapper.');return false;}const count=wrapper.readInt();console.log(`📦 Parsing Inventory: ${count} item(s)`);this._items=[];for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const item={id:wrapper.readInt(),itemId:wrapper.readInt(),userId:wrapper.readInt(),slot:wrapper.readInt(),quantity:wrapper.readInt(),durability:wrapper.readInt(),iconPath:wrapper.readString(),itemType:wrapper.readString(),rarity:wrapper.readString()};console.log(`🔹 Item ${i+1}:`,item);this._items.push(item);}return true;}get items(){return this._items;}}
